title: Admin portal — backend endpoints/fields the frontend still needs
context: The Admin portal pages were migrated from mock (AdminContext, deleted) to real API calls. Reused endpoints: GET /Admin/dashboard, /Admin/reports, /Admin/users (+/{id} GET/PUT/DELETE, approve/reject/suspend), /Admin/audit-logs, GET/PUT /Admin/settings, /Finance/transactions, /Classes (+/{id}), /Exams (+create/update/delete), /Notifications, /Users/me.

gaps.title: Admin dashboard/report expose only scalar totals — no time-series
gaps.currentState: AdminDashboard returns scalar counts; /Admin/reports adds only { totalUsers, totalClasses, totalExams, totalRevenue, monthlyRevenue[] }. Charts that need a user-growth series, revenue-by-category split, or retention have no source and render empty. The 'exams this month' sparkline keeps static decorative bars (only scalar totalExams is real).
proposedChanges: Add user-growth series, revenue-by-category, and (optionally) profit-by-month to /Admin/reports.

gaps.title: User row lacks subject/rating; approval lacks documents/verification
gaps.currentState: AdminUserResponse = { id, name, email, phone, role, status, avatar?, school?, bio?, createdAt }. The users table's 'subject' and 'rating' columns and the approvals page's uploaded-documents/verification-checklist have no backend fields — those columns/blocks were repurposed (school) or removed. Reject reason is write-only (not returned on rejected rows).
proposedChanges: Add subject + rating to AdminUserResponse for tutor rows (or a dedicated tutor lookup).
Expose registration documents + verification detail, and return the stored reject reason.

gaps.title: Finance transactions list (used on AdminTransactions) has no total/summary
gaps.currentState: Same as finance F-GAP-1/2 — /Finance/transactions returns no total/totalPages (prev/next paging) and no summary endpoint (aggregate cards reflect the current page only). AdminTransactionResponse has no user avatar.
proposedChanges: Return PagedResult total/totalPages; add a transactions-summary endpoint; (optional) add avatar to AdminTransactionResponse.

gaps.title: Audit log is minimal and unfilterable; no global stats
gaps.currentState: AuditLogResponse = { id, actor, action, target, timestamp }. GET /Admin/audit-logs takes only `page` — no search/action filter (filtering is client-side over the current page), and the summary counts are per-page, not global.
proposedChanges: Accept search/action/date filters on /Admin/audit-logs; add a global audit-stats endpoint.

gaps.title: System settings missing a few UI fields; classes have no DELETE / structured slot picker
gaps.currentState: SystemSettings lacks examFee, supportEmail, minPasswordLength (kept read-only in the UI). /Classes has no DELETE (delete button is a no-op toast) and create needs structured weeklySlots (a default slot is sent). Exam DTO (ExamListItemResponse) has no test `code`/`level`/per-question type, and only questionCount (full questions need /Exams/{id}).
proposedChanges: Add examFee, supportEmail, minPasswordLength to SystemSettings.
Add DELETE /Classes/{id}; provide a structured weekly-slot picker contract.
Add code/level to the exam DTO if those are real fields.
